title: Summarize Technical Documentation with Key Features
scenario: Write a prompt to summarize technical documentation. The target output should include the product's name, version, main features, and system requirements. The output should be in a formal tone and include relevant keywords. Limit the prompt to 120 words.
constraints: Must include the product's name and version
Must have at least 3 main features and system requirements
Must be written in a formal tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Evaluate if the product's name and version are included
Assess if the main features are accurate and relevant
Verify if the system requirements are accurate and complete
